heading: Requirements
label: 12262 Requirements
text: For the purpose of placing Federal participants in a family unity demonstration project under , the Attorney General shall consult with the Secretary of Health and Human Services regarding the development and operation of the project.section 12261 of this title
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 13902 of Title 42
